items.title: Realm of the Mad God Exalt
Poker Master - Texas Hold'em, Roulette, Blackjack, Baccarat, Omaha, Slots, Teen Patti
Risk of Rain 2: Seekers of the Storm
Age of Mythology: Retold - Obsidian Mirror

CounterAttack: Uprising
items.description: CounterAttack: Uprising is a side scrolling space shooter (shmup). Team up or fight solo, 1 - 4 player local or up to 8 players online coop, unlock upgrades, use powerful ultimate abilities, enhance your ship the way you want, and save the Earth from annihilation.

items.title: DarkOrbit Reloaded
items.description: Dark Orbit is a free-2-play space MMO where three companies battle for galactic domination. Customize ships, trade resources, fight aliens and uncover a grand conspiracy on your epic cosmic journey. Thrilling PvP and PvE missions await! Will you lead your faction beyond the final frontier?

items.title: SUPER PEOPLE
items.description: SUPER PEOPLE is a skill-driven battle royale from WONDER PEOPLE. With 15 super soldiers, each with unique abilities, you shape the pace of engagements, your tactics, and the finish—turning a familiar battle royale into a completely different kind of fun.

items.title: Uncharted Waters Online
items.description: Discover yourself in the “Age of Discovery” where you’ll sail out into the uncharted waters! Discover real historical artifacts and mystical legends! Start a company and make enormous fortunes! Fight in fierce sea battles! Whatever your play style, you can play who you want and how you want in UWO!

items.title: DK Online
items.description: DK Online, a fantasy-themed classic MMORPG, invites you to combat monsters, engage in intense PvP, and prove your skills by leveling up. You can magically transform your look into stylish characters. Conquer achievements and explore a vast world as a Dragon Knight. Massive rewards await you!

items.title: Anomaly Zone
items.description: Anomaly Zone is an open world MMORPG and a post-apocalyptic shooter. Be a scientist, a soldier, a hunter or an engineer. Explore anomalous territories, search for artifacts, fight mutants and other players. Participate in mass PvP and PvE battles. The Zone is waiting!

items.title: M.A.R.S.
items.description: MARS is a Free-To-Play Third Person Shooter set in an evolving sci-fi world. From the hilarious Headhunter mode, to Huge Mecha vs Mecha battles, to fully customizable loadouts; whether Co-op or PvP, M.A.R.S. has something for everyone. Kill, Die, Repeat.

items.title: Trianga's Project: Battle Splash 2.0
items.description: Full-Physics Water FPS/TPS, Class-based Action-packed Arena Shooter, Run & Gun with Rocket Jump, Single/Coop/Multiplayers, Survive Procedural Waves of Enemies, Lots of Game Modes, Endless Challenges and Replayability, with an Anime Beautiful Cast, and More...!

items.title: Shop Legends
items.description: Immerse yourself in an Idle Simulation Tycoon RPG like no other, where you are tasked with managing a thriving item shop, crafting legendary gear for customers, commanding mighty heroes to loot rare artifacts & blueprints all while challenging top-ranked shopkeepers in an epic business adventure!

items.title: Baccarat Online: Baccarist
items.description: Favored by the highest of high rollers, baccarat is one of the world's oldest and most popular card games. The aim of the game is to guess who will hit the highest hand value, which in this game is 9. Feel the risk as you dive into the casino atmosphere and hit the big time!

items.title: Hero Siege - Bard (Class)
items.description: Shred the battlefield with face-melting solos and thunderous riffs! The Bard storms into Hero Siege with amps cranked to 11, fusing the fury of death metal with the raw brutality of the pit.

items.title: Make Way
items.description: Speed around loops, dart through train crossings, drift around helter skelters, and unleash wacky weaponry in this modern take on classic top-down multiplayer racing games such as Micro Machines and Mashed. The twist? You build the track.

items.title: Age of Empires IV: Dynasties of the East
items.description: Expand your legacy in Dynasties of the East—featuring 4 new variant civilizations, 8 maps, 6 biomes, and a new roguelite RTS experience with dynamic challenges and unpredictable wave-based attacks

items.title: THE FINALS - The Apothecarion Set
items.description: The Apothecarion Set includes: 1 Legendary Outfit, 1 Epic Emote, 1 Legendary Weapon Skin, 1 Epic Charm, 2 400 Multibucks.

items.title: BitCraft Online
items.description: Join thousands of players in a true single-world MMORPG. Carve out a cozy nook, master a player-driven economy, or band together to transform the ancient wilderness into thriving cities. From humble beginnings to legend, your choices matter - because in BitCraft, your actions shape our world.

items.title: MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries - Shadow of Kerensky
items.description: Take on a 12-mission story campaign set during the Clan Invasion. Battle through a shifting Inner Sphere map, face powerful Clan OmniMechs, and salvage cutting-edge Clan tech.

items.title: Elite Dangerous: Odyssey
items.description: Disembark, Commander, and leave your mark on the galaxy in Elite Dangerous: Odyssey. Explore distant worlds on foot and expand the frontier of known space.

items.title: theHunter: Call of the Wild™ - Emerald Coast Australia
items.description: Welcome to Australia! Discover breathtaking landscapes and hunt iconic animal species such as the Saltwater Crocodile and Eastern Gray Kangaroo as you explore this magical new hunting destination down under.

items.title: theHunter: Call of the Wild™ - Sundarpatan Nepal Hunting Reserve
items.description: Brave the beauty at the stunning Sundarpatan Nepal Hunting Reserve. Hunt among three distinct climate regions and go in pursuit of 10 new animal species.

items.title: DiRT Rally 2.0
items.description: DiRT Rally 2.0 dares you to carve your way through a selection of iconic rally locations from across the globe, in the most powerful off-road vehicles ever made, knowing that the smallest mistake could end your stage.

items.title: World of Tanks Blitz
items.description: Blow off steam and tank turrets in a free-to-play online 7v7 tank shooter! Drive hundreds of tanks, from museum classics to "did-that-ever-exist?" specials, in quick 5 to 7-minute brawls packed with metal mayhem. Play solo or team up with a friend and enjoy smooth action even on modest hardware!

items.title: Nation Red
items.description: Nation Red is an ultra fast infinite play arena-based shooter providing an exceptional close-quarter battlefield experience. Fight thousands of zombie mutants and their bosses in frantic bloody gameplay while earning close to 100 perks. Fight in Barricade, Survival or Free Play mode.

items.title: Final Exam
items.description: Jump into the frenzied action and the whacky humor of a pure 2.5D side-scroller! While they were going to their old high school for what was supposed to be the party of their life, four long-time friends end up in a ghost town full of monstrous creatures.

items.title: Crossout
items.description: Crossout - the postapocalyptic MMO action game where you can create a unique design for an armoured vehicle from dozens of parts and then drive it into multiplayer battles raging on land and in the skies alike.

items.title: Strinova
items.description: Strinova is an anime-style third-person tactical competitive shooter. Switch freely between three-dimensional and two-dimensional forms in this one-of-a-kind game that offers a unique tactical shooting system for an unparalleled experience.

items.title: Goose Goose Duck
items.description: Goose Goose Duck is a game of social deduction for up to 16 players. Players are separated into different groups that are each assigned a different objective. Complete your team’s objective to win!

items.title: War Selection
items.description: War Selection is a compelling RTS game featuring base building, resource extraction and warfare. Evolve from a stone age tribe to a distinct industrial nation with unique game mechanics and battle for supremacy with dozens of players on a unique procedurally generated map.

items.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin
items.description: <The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin> is an open-world anime RPG set in the universe of [The Seven Deadly Sins]. Step into the role of Prince Tristan of Liones and explore an open-world Britannia, as you embark on a journey to restore order to a world thrown into chaos by the collision of time and space.

items.title: Asphalt Legends
items.description: Spark your competitive soul with Asphalt Legends and feel the collective heartbeat of the road! Join forces with other players to speed through intense arcade races, perform jaw-dropping stunts, and charge towards victory while driving the finest hypercars!

items.title: Astral Party
items.description: Astral Party is a multiplayer party game populated by cute anime girls! Choose your favorite character, strategize skills & cards, and roll the dice to destroy friendships in this unique board game.

items.title: Project Zomboid
items.description: Project Zomboid is the ultimate in zombie survival. Alone or in MP: you loot, build, craft, fight, farm and fish in a struggle to survive. A hardcore RPG skillset, a vast map, massively customisable sandbox and a cute tutorial raccoon await the unwary. So how will you die? All it takes is a bite..

items.title: Rivals of Aether II
items.description: Rivals of Aether II is the sequel to the hit indie fighting game, Rivals of Aether. Play as both new and returning elemental fighters in the next generation of platform fighters.

items.title: PowerWash Simulator 2 - Adventure Time Pack
items.description: What time is it?! The new Adventure Time Pack is set to bring the Ooo to PowerWash Simulator TwOoo. Grab your friends and blast away grime from distant lands or clean up the wreckage of the world as a solo adventurer in five jobs from the world of Adventure Time – the fun will never end!

items.title: REMATCH
items.description: Rematch is an online multiplayer football game. Control one player and compete with your team in fast-paced 5v5 matches from an immersive third-person perspective. Team up with your friends and join the action.

items.title: Risk of Rain 2
items.description: Escape a chaotic alien planet by fighting through hordes of frenzied monsters – with your friends, or on your own. Combine loot in surprising ways and master each character until you become the havoc you feared upon your first crash landing.

items.title: State of Survival
items.description: Survive the Zombies War in this RPG game of Apocalypse and Survival

items.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Chronicles of Mystara
items.description: Dungeons & Dragons: Chronicles of Mystara brings reworkings of two of Capcom’s classic arcade hits - Dungeons & Dragons: Tower of Doom and Dungeons & Dragons: Shadow over Mystara – together in one definitive digital package.

items.title: Zombasite
items.description: Zombasite is a zombie apocalypse action RPG set in a dynamic, evolving, fantasy world for Windows, Mac, and Linux.

items.title: Infection Rate
items.description: 3rd person Co-op Zombie Survival with multiplayer

items.title: SpaceCraft
items.description: The Universe is yours. SpaceCraft is an online space exploration and building game. Explore a vast galaxy of solar systems and planets, mine and craft resources, design and build ships, automate planetary bases and interplanetary logistics, trade and cooperate.

items.title: Fistful of Frags
items.description: Multiplayer based, first person enabled, action packed and skill demanding shooter set in the Wild West times. A unique combination of non stop action and slow but powerful weaponry.

items.title: Wheelchair Wizards
items.description: Wheelchair Wizards is a 4 player party game where you battle your friends while upgrading your wizard.

items.title: Pirate101
items.description: Assemble your ragtag crew and prepare to plunder the skyways in search of the legendary map to El Dorado! Danger lurks around every corner as you outsmart clockwork soldiers, uncover hidden mysteries, and unleash powerful combos in this pirate turn-based tactics MMORPG.

items.title: MapleStory M
items.description: The MapleStory you missed is calling you. MapleStory M is an MMORPG full of MapleStory's signature charm and worldview. Enjoy jobs bursting with personality, lighthearted battles, an easy leveling-up system, and even co-op gameplay. Begin your own adventure in this adorable 2D side-scrolling world.

items.title: Force of Warships: Battleship Games
items.description: Direct your battleship to glorious victory! Online battle under your leadership!

items.title: Ember Knights
items.description: Ember Knights is an action rogue-lite for 1-4 players where you play as legendary knights, the last spark of hope against the mad sorcerer Praxis and his hordes of unwavering fiends. Wield weapons & skills, build synergies with game-changing relics and free the universe of Praxis’ corruption.

items.title: American Truck Simulator - Louisiana
items.description: Embark on a journey to the Pelican State nestled in the south of the U.S.. Discover the subtropical climate of the state, which has allowed the magnificent brooding scenery of coastal bayous, and lush, dank vegetation to thrive.

items.title: My Summer Car
items.description: My Summer Car is the ultimate car owning, building, fixing, tuning, maintenance AND permadeath life survival simulator. You start the game with hundreds of loose parts and assemble both car and engine.

items.title: XCOM® 2
items.description: XCOM 2 is the sequel to XCOM: Enemy Unknown, the 2012 award-winning strategy game of the year. Earth has changed and is now under alien rule. Facing impossible odds you must rebuild XCOM, and ignite a global resistance to reclaim our world and save humanity.

items.title: CarX Street
items.description: Conquer mountain roads, highways, and city streets. Build your dream car with detailed tuning that unleashes the potential of “CarX Technology”© physics. Take part in thrilling races, enjoying realistic gameplay and dynamic driving.

items.title: DoodleVR
items.description: Doodle VR is a Pictionary like VR game. A classic word guessing game where one person draws a picture in virtual reality and the teammates have to guess what is being drawn.

items.title: PixelJunk™ Monsters 2
items.description: PixelJunk™ Monsters is back with the simple, yet highly strategic real-time tower defense gameplay gameplay of the original title, now with updated graphics and brand new multiplayer modes!

items.title: Crazy Wheels
items.description: The floor is lava! Relive your childhood dream-races around the house with Crazy Wheels, a fast-paced, action-packed arcade racing game.

items.title: Fast Dust
items.description: Fast Dust is a racing game, cars with character, heavily battered but still have some power under the hood. You have 70 racetracks and drive through the forest, canyon and in the old factory town. Get ready for rain, snow, fog and night drive. Discover shortcuts on the road and win!

items.title: HyperParasite
items.description: A rogue-lite twin-stick shooter/brawler that never plays the same twice. Collect and control 60 different characters as the body-snatching alien Parasite with a grudge against humanity. Fight to the top of the food chain: possess the President, push the Big Red Button and one-up the human race.

items.title: Alien Swarm
items.description: Co-operative multiplayer game and complete code base available for free.

items.title: Soccer Field Pro 3D
items.description: Free-to-play 3D football game with realistic physics, fast-paced multiplayer matches, player customization, and room creation. Play with friends or compete online!

items.title: Dirty Bomb®
items.description: Work together or die alone! Fight to restore peace to London or tear it down for profit in the most challenging team based shooter around.

items.title: Iverian Wars: Craxion vs Defugel
items.description: Iverian Wars: Craxion vs Defugel is a faction-based strategic action MMORPG set in the world of Iveria. Engage in large-scale battles, customize your gear freely, and shape the fate of the continent through war and strategy.

items.title: Life is Feudal: Arden
items.description: Life is Feudal: Arden is a new free-to-play open-world MMORPG set in the Middle Ages, built on the foundation of Life is Feudal: MMO. Engage in thrilling PvP combat, navigate political intrigue, master a variety of professions and craft unique items. Forge your own path to power and greatness!

items.title: StarRupture - Supporter Pack
items.description: Supporter Pack for StarRupture grants you extra items for the game and lots of digital goodies.

items.title: Travellers Rest
items.description: Craft, farm, build and cook! In Travellers Rest you will have to use all the available tools to become the best tavern keeper in the realm. Create unique dishes and drinks to please your customers as you discover the world and its colorful characters.

items.title: American Truck Simulator - Arkansas
items.description: Welcome to the Natural State! Located in the south-central region of the United States, the state is a nature wonderland with three national forests, many State Parks, nearly 9,000 miles of pristine streams and rivers like the Arkansas and Mississippi, as well as the ever-stretching Ozark and Ouachita mountain ranges.

items.title: Farming Simulator 22
items.description: Create your farm and let the good times grow! Harvest crops, tend to animals, manage productions, and take on seasonal challenges.

items.title: Your Only Move Is HUSTLE
items.description: Master your technique, execute flashy combos, and outsmart opponents across the world, frame-by-frame. Slow down the clock to fine-tune your fighting style in this innovative, turn-based combat simulator. Pulverize your friends and choreograph spectacular fight scenes. No training mode required.

items.description: This game is perfect to play with a friend or significant other | Game: Capy Castaway  #indiegame #whattoplay #multip...

items.title: Birth of Shadows®
items.description: Play as a Shadow Knight with unique rage mechanics. Campaign and Co-op multiplayer. Create new content with powerful map editor.

items.title: Climbey
items.description: Climbey is a VR-only climbing game! The goal is to climb to the finish as fast as you can, avoiding obstacles and trying not to fall along the way.

items.title: Scan Your Heart "愛情限時批"
items.description: Scan Your Heart is a game about “Scanner and Barcode”. Using scanner to scan the barcode on your opponent to defeat him. And this game is set in Kaohsiung, Taiwan. Your can experience the beauty of Kaohsiung.

items.title: Swords and Sorcery - Underworld - Definitive Edition
items.description: Swords and Sorcery - Underworld is a party-based, first person view role-playing game with turn-based combat and a square grid 3D environment. The art was made by a professional comics illustrator.

items.title: Codex of Victory
items.description: In this sci-fi turn-based strategy with real-time base-building elements, you’ll be defending human territories against the transhuman Augments. Expand your HQ, and manufacture and upgrade an army of advanced drones to wage interplanetary war for Humanity!

items.title: Smithworks
items.description: Smithworks is a first-person 3D cooperative multiplayer game where players play as fledgling blacksmiths. It is a humorous and chaotic experience where players will need to communicate effectively in order to craft these weapons quickly before the customers get angry.

items.title: Darwin Project
items.description: In Darwin Project, ten inmates must survive the elements, track each other, fight, craft tools, and use their social skills to be the last one standing. It's a unique take on battle royale with a Show Director to influence the match and Spectator Interactions to create a one-of-a-kind game show.

items.title: Welcome to Dustown
items.description: Welcome to Dustown is a single-player or cooperative horror game for up to 4 players. Play as field scientists exploring vast labyrinthine cornfields, collecting samples and evidence for a mysterious corporation. Make sure you don't get killed at the crossroads.

items.title: Pizza Panic!
items.description: Pizza Panic! Is a 1-4-player co-op cooking game where you and your friends try to keep your pizza parlor running for as long as possible. Work together, bake pizzas, earn money, buy upgrades and ensure you have the greatest pizza parlor of all time!

items.title: GPRO - Classic racing manager
items.description: Manage your racing team, driver and a car, prepare setups and strategy for every race, plan your season and budget, analyze race telemetry.

items.title: Lugh World
items.description: Lugh World is an action monster-taming MMORPG set in a living, ever-evolving open world. Capture and evolve unique beings called Lughs, explore a vast world, and face epic challenges in real-time battles. Uncover secrets, forge your own path, and live the game you’ve always dreamed of!

items.title: Mage Arena
items.description: A co-op PvP experience about using your voice to cast spells in the Mage Arena to settle an ages-old feud between sorcerers and warlocks.

items.title: Shotgun Farmers
items.description: Shotgun Farmers is the multplayer shooter where missed shots grow guns. Fire your bullets into the ground to plant your ammo. The longer a gun plant grows the more ammo you will get!

items.title: Old World - Wonders and Dynasties
items.description: History is shaped by fountainheads of great dynasties that leave their mark on the world - forge the foundations of powerful empires and build legendary wonders that will stand the test of time.

items.title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Arbites Class
items.description: You are justice. The Adeptus Arbites enforce the Lex Imperialis – the Imperial Law. Utterly unforgiving, they persecute heretics and traitors throughout the Emperor’s realm. Restore order to Tertium with your Cyber-Mastiff and a devastating array of new weaponry.
